text:
14. We find no reason to interfere with the conviction and sentence 
imposed on the accused. The appeal stands dismissed. The 
appellants, if on bail, shall appear and surrender before the Sessions 
[2025] 4 S.C.R.  
343
Maukam Singh & Others v. State of Madhya Pradesh
Court, within two weeks of this order; failing which the Sessions Court 
shall take appropriate steps to apprehend them so as to undergo 
the sentence awarded.
15. Pending application(s), if any, shall stand disposed of.
Result of the case: Appeal dismissed.
†
